errors.OTP_INVALID: Incorrect verification code. Please check again.

errors.USERNAME_TAKEN: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
errors.ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: Your account has been blocked. Please contact support.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Session expired. Please log in again.

errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid session. Please log in again.
